name: tmp - sec_params
rawContent:
-- =============================================================================
-- 3. ISS_ANNOUNCEMENT_ALLOTMENT_PARAMS (Master)
-- =============================================================================
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS iss.iss_announcement_allotment_params CASCADE;

CREATE TABLE iss.iss_announcement_allotment_params (
    id int8 NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY (START WITH 150000000000001 INCREMENT BY 1),
    "uuid" varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    
    -- Link to Parent Configs
    iss_sec_params_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,    
    
    -- Descriptions
    coupon_rate_desc varchar(100) NULL,
    yield_price_desc varchar(100) NULL,
    comp_app_desc varchar(100) NULL,
    noncomp_app_desc varchar(100) NULL,
    eligible_applicants_desc varchar(100) NULL,
    
    -- Footnotes
    footnote_new varchar(4000) NULL,
    footnote_reopen varchar(4000) NULL,
    
    -- Operational Flags
    comp_bids_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    noncomp_bids_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    interfacing_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    method_of_sale varchar(50) NOT NULL,
    
    sof_cash_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    sof_cpfis_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    sof_cpfoa_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    sof_srs_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    
    -- AI Flags
    ai_retail_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    ai_institutional_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    
    limits_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    safeguards_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    underbid_check_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    accept_negative_yield_flag bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    
    -- Limits & Calculation Logic
    coupon_pymt_frequency varchar(50) NOT NULL, 
    limit_per_issue_pd_pct numeric(5, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    limit_per_issue_nonpd_pct numeric(5, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    ind_noncomp_limit_pd_pct numeric(5, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    ind_noncomp_limit_nonpd_amt numeric(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    overall_issuance_noncomp_lmt numeric(5, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    lower_upper_bound_offset_bps numeric(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    underbid_insert_pctile numeric(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    applicable_pds varchar(36) NULL,

    -- Audit
    status varchar(20) NOT NULL,
    "version" numeric(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,

    CONSTRAINT iss_ann_allot_params_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_ann_allot_params_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid),
    -- Relationship Established Here
    CONSTRAINT fk_annparams_secparams FOREIGN KEY (iss_sec_params_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_sec_params("uuid")
);

-- =============================================================================
-- 3.1 ISS_ANNOUNCEMENT_ALLOTMENT_PARAMS_T (Transaction)
-- =============================================================================
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS iss.iss_announcement_allotment_params_t CASCADE;

CREATE TABLE iss.iss_announcement_allotment_params_t (
    trans_id int8 NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY (START WITH 150000000000001 INCREMENT BY 1),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id int8 NULL,
    "uuid" varchar(36) NULL,
    
    iss_sec_params_uuid varchar(36) NULL,    
    
    coupon_rate_desc varchar(100) NULL,
    yield_price_desc varchar(100) NULL,
    comp_app_desc varchar(100) NULL,
    noncomp_app_desc varchar(100) NULL,
    eligible_applicants_desc varchar(100) NULL,
    
    footnote_new varchar(4000) NULL,
    footnote_reopen varchar(4000) NULL,
    
    comp_bids_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    noncomp_bids_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    interfacing_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    method_of_sale varchar(50) NULL,
    
    sof_cash_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    sof_cpfis_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    sof_cpfoa_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    sof_srs_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    
    ai_retail_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    ai_institutional_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    
    limits_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    safeguards_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    underbid_check_enabled_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    accept_negative_yield_flag bpchar(1) NULL,
    
    coupon_pymt_frequency varchar(50) NULL, 
    limit_per_issue_pd_pct numeric(5, 2) NULL,
    limit_per_issue_nonpd_pct numeric(5, 2) NULL,
    ind_noncomp_limit_pd_pct numeric(5, 2) NULL,
    ind_noncomp_limit_nonpd_amt numeric(20) NULL,
    overall_issuance_noncomp_lmt numeric(5, 2) NULL,
    lower_upper_bound_offset_bps numeric(5) NULL,
    underbid_insert_pctile numeric(3) NULL,
    applicable_pds varchar(36) NULL,

    status varchar(20) NULL,
    "version" numeric(5) NULL,
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,

    CONSTRAINT iss_ann_allot_params_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_ann_allot_params_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

-- =============================================================================
-- 2. ISS_CALENDAR_PARAMS (Master)
-- =============================================================================
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS iss.iss_calendar_params CASCADE;

CREATE TABLE iss.iss_calendar_params (
    id int8 NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY (START WITH 150000000000001 INCREMENT BY 1),
    "uuid" varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    
    -- Parent Link
    iss_sec_params_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    
    -- Tenor Definition
    tenor numeric(3) NOT NULL,
    tenor_unit bpchar(1) NOT NULL,
    
    -- Scheduling Rules
    issue_code_prefix varchar(2) NOT NULL,
    issue_frequency varchar(20) NOT NULL,
    announcement_day_offset numeric(2) NOT NULL,        
    auction_allotment_day_offset numeric(2) NOT NULL,   
    bid_collation_period varchar(20) NULL,
    
    -- Display Dates
    issue_day varchar(50) NOT NULL,              
    bond_announcement_day_offset numeric(2) NULL, 
    size_announcement_day_offset numeric(2) NULL, 
    maturity_day varchar(50) NULL,               
    closing_day_offset numeric(2) NULL,             
    
    -- Validity
    effective_date_start timestamp NULL,
    effective_date_end timestamp NULL,
    generation_by_algorithm bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N'::bpchar,
    
    -- Audit
    status varchar(20) NOT NULL, 
    "version" numeric(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    
    CONSTRAINT iss_calendar_params_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_calendar_params_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid),
    CONSTRAINT iss_calendar_params_unique_config UNIQUE (iss_sec_params_uuid, tenor, tenor_unit),
    -- Relationship Established Here
    CONSTRAINT fk_calparams_secparams FOREIGN KEY (iss_sec_params_uuid) REFERENCES iss.iss_sec_params("uuid")
);

-- =============================================================================
-- 2.1 ISS_CALENDAR_PARAMS_T (Transaction)
-- =============================================================================
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS iss.iss_calendar_params_t CASCADE;

CREATE TABLE iss.iss_calendar_params_t (
    trans_id int8 NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY (START WITH 150000000000001 INCREMENT BY 1),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id int8 NULL,
    "uuid" varchar(36) NULL,
    
    iss_sec_params_uuid varchar(36) NULL,
    
    tenor numeric(3) NULL,
    tenor_unit bpchar(1) NULL,
    
    issue_code_prefix varchar(2) NULL,
    issue_frequency varchar(20) NULL,
    announcement_day_offset numeric(2) NULL,        
    auction_allotment_day_offset numeric(2) NULL,   
    bid_collation_period varchar(20) NULL,
    
    issue_day varchar(50) NULL,              
    bond_announcement_day_offset numeric(2) NULL, 
    size_announcement_day_offset numeric(2) NULL, 
    maturity_day varchar(50) NULL,               
    closing_day_offset numeric(2) NULL,             
    
    effective_date_start timestamp NULL,
    effective_date_end timestamp NULL,
    generation_by_algorithm bpchar(1) NULL,
    
    status varchar(20) NULL, 
    "version" numeric(5) NULL,
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    
    CONSTRAINT iss_calendar_params_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_calendar_params_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

-- =============================================================================
-- 1. ISS_SEC_PARAMS (Master)
-- =============================================================================
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS iss.iss_sec_params CASCADE;

CREATE TABLE iss.iss_sec_params (
    id int8 NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY (START WITH 150000000000001 INCREMENT BY 1),
    "uuid" varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    
    security_type varchar(50) NOT NULL,      -- e.g. 'SGS', 'TBILL'
    bill_bond_ind bpchar(4) NOT NULL,        -- 'BILL' or 'BOND'
    currency bpchar(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SGD',
    
    cal_gen_frequency varchar(50) NOT NULL,  -- 'YEARLY', 'SEMI', 'QUARTERLY'
    cal_gen_algo_class varchar(255) NULL,    -- Java class
    bid_collation_period varchar(50) NOT NULL, -- 'MONTH' or 'DAYS'
    
    min_tender_amt numeric(7,2) NOT NULL,
    denomination numeric(7,2) NOT NULL,
    sb_individual_holding_limit numeric(15,2) NULL,
    app_closing_time time NOT NULL,

    "version" numeric(5) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    
    CONSTRAINT iss_sec_params_pkey PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_sec_params_uuid_key UNIQUE (uuid),
    CONSTRAINT iss_sec_params_type_key UNIQUE (security_type)
);

-- =============================================================================
-- 1.1 ISS_SEC_PARAMS_T (Transaction)
-- =============================================================================
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS iss.iss_sec_params_t CASCADE;

CREATE TABLE iss.iss_sec_params_t (
    trans_id int8 NOT NULL GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY (START WITH 150000000000001 INCREMENT BY 1),
    trans_uuid varchar(36) NOT NULL DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    id int8 NULL,
    "uuid" varchar(36) NULL,
    
    security_type varchar(50) NULL,
    bill_bond_ind bpchar(4) NULL,
    currency bpchar(3) NULL,
    
    cal_gen_frequency varchar(50) NULL,
    cal_gen_algo_class varchar(255) NULL,
    bid_collation_period varchar(50) NULL,
    
    min_tender_amt numeric(7,2) NULL,
    denomination numeric(7,2) NULL,
    sb_individual_holding_limit numeric(15,2) NULL,
    app_closing_time time NULL,

    "version" numeric(5) NULL,
    is_deleted bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    is_migrated bpchar(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'N',
    created_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    created_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    updated_dt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_by varchar(36) NOT NULL,
    
    CONSTRAINT iss_sec_params_t_pkey PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT iss_sec_params_t_trans_uuid_key UNIQUE (trans_uuid)
);

_versionInfo.note: Versions stripped to reduce size. Re-enable versioning after import to start fresh.
